page-module__feh-ua__heroSection page-mo: The future of aviation is coming soon.
Elevate your commute with our all-electric air taxi, soon to be bookable at the tap of a button.
Zero traffic. Zero operating emissions. Just the space and time your day deserves.
experience-highlights: Leave city congestion behind and choose a stress-free commute through the clouds.

Sit back and enjoy.
Breathtaking views come standard with every seat.
Enjoy seamless travel with a choreographed rideshare to the vertiport.
Imagine looking forward to your commute. And forgetting what gridlock feels like. When flight is a part of everyday life, anything is possible.
app: Our app coordinates your end-to-end commute, including an Uber to and from our vertiport.
Seamless door to door travel, all from a few taps on our app.
news: Joby Completes Piloted Electric Air Taxi Flight Across San Francisco Bay and Around the Golden Gate
Joby’s First FAA-Conforming Aircraft Takes Flight
Joby to Begin U.S. Operations in 2026 Under White House Air Taxi Program
section-partners: there's nowhere to go but up.
We’re partnering with global leaders in ground transportation to seamlessly integrate air mobility into the future of door-to-door travel.
Our partnerships with leading global airlines will integrate our air taxi service into existing aviation networks.
Together with key infrastructure partners, we’re building the physical backbone needed for convenient everyday flight.
We collaborate with pioneers in manufacturing and innovation to create a vertically integrated, world-class production ecosystem.
Our aviation technology partnerships power the systems that support navigation, autonomy, pilot training, and operational excellence.
We collaborate with forward-thinking government agencies to shape policy, accelerate innovation, and enable the introduction of advanced air mobility.
story: The sky was never the limit.
In 2009, a small team of Joby engineers set out to build the future of flight. Thousands of test flights later, we've turned "what if" into "what's next"?
illustration: Imagine a world where every cross-town invitation is a definite ‘yes’.
Where game day is gridlock-free and every restaurant is local.
Where our cities are greener, more friendly places to be.
footer: By entering your email address you agree to receive newsletters, updates, and marketing information. You can opt out at any time.

bodyText: The future of aviation is coming soon.
Elevate your commute with our all-electric air taxi, soon to be bookable at the tap of a button.
Zero traffic. Zero operating emissions. Just the space and time your day deserves.
Leave city congestion behind and choose a stress-free commute through the clouds.

Sit back and enjoy.
Breathtaking views come standard with every seat.
Enjoy seamless travel with a choreographed rideshare to the vertiport.
Imagine looking forward to your commute. And forgetting what gridlock feels like. When flight is a part of everyday life, anything is possible.
Our app coordinates your end-to-end commute, including an Uber to and from our vertiport.
Seamless door to door travel, all from a few taps on our app.
Joby Completes Piloted Electric Air Taxi Flight Across San Francisco Bay and Around the Golden Gate
Joby’s First FAA-Conforming Aircraft Takes Flight
Joby to Begin U.S. Operations in 2026 Under White House Air Taxi Program
there's nowhere to go but up.
We’re partnering with global leaders in ground transportation to seamlessly integrate air mobility into the future of door-to-door travel.
Our partnerships with leading global airlines will integrate our air taxi service into existing aviation networks.
Together with key infrastructure partners, we’re building the physical backbone needed for convenient everyday flight.
We collaborate with pioneers in manufacturing and innovation to create a vertically integrated, world-class production ecosystem.
Our aviation technology partnerships power the systems that support navigation, autonomy, pilot training, and operational excellence.
We collaborate with forward-thinking government agencies to shape policy, accelerate innovation, and enable the introduction of advanced air mobility.
The sky was never the limit.
In 2009, a small team of Joby engineers set out to build the future of flight. Thousands of test flights later, we've turned "what if" into "what's next"?
Imagine a world where every cross-town invitation is a definite ‘yes’.
Where game day is gridlock-free and every restaurant is local.
Where our cities are greener, more friendly places to be.
By entering your email address you agree to receive newsletters, updates, and marketing information. You can opt out at any time.
